item.title: F-025b: AI Floating Action Bar
item.intent: The AI action bar is the interaction hub — it must feel like a native extension of text selection, not a separate AI mode
item.description: Depends on: FEAT-039 (Text Engine). When user selects text, a floating action bar appears above the selection. Contains: standard format actions (Bold, Italic, Link) AND AI actions (Improve, Summarize). Pro AI actions (Translate, Tone) appear with Pro badge for subscribers or as discoverable options for non-subscribers. Bar follows selection, dismisses on deselect. Keyboard shortcut Cmd+J focuses the AI section of the bar. Bar adapts to available width. VoiceOver announces all actions.
acceptanceCriteria: Floating bar appears within 200ms of text selection
Bar contains both formatting (Bold, Italic) and AI (Improve, Summarize) actions
Pro AI actions show subtle Pro badge for subscribers
Non-subscriber tapping a Pro action sees a non-intrusive upgrade explanation
Bar dismisses cleanly on deselect with no ghost UI
Cmd+J invokes AI assist when text is selected
VoiceOver can navigate and activate all bar actions
